name: Nkewa ọbara ọgbụgba (Klas I-IV)
description: Nhazi ọbara ọgbụgba ATLS site na atụmatụ mfu ọbara na nzaghachi anụ ahụ.
instructions: Mee atụmatụ mfu ọbara ma dakọọ akara mmụta physiological na klaasị. Ngwa ngwa ọgwụgwọ na-abawanye na klas.

scoring.treatment: Lelee, PO mmiri mmiri ma ọ bụrụ na ọ nwere ike
Mmiri IV + ngwaahịa ọbara, njikwa ọbara ọgbụgba ozugbo
Njikwa ọbara ọgbụgba ịwa ahụ ozugbo -- na-eyi ndụ egwu

pediatric.note: Ụmụaka na-akwụ ụgwọ ogologo oge tupu ha akwụ ụgwọ. Klas III/IV nwere ike ịpụta na BP dị nso na-adịkarị ruo mgbe ọdịda mberede. Tụkwasị obi tachycardia na ọnọdụ uche n'elu BP.

obstetric.note: Ndị ọrịa dị ime nwere mmụba ọbara 40-50%. Enwere ike ịnabata mfu ka ukwuu tupu igosi akara. Nsogbu nwa ebu n'afọ nwere ike ibute akara nke nne.
